name: Set of 2 24" Wicker Back Metal Counter Height Barstool with Footrest Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Accent your home bar or other spaces with the pk 24" Woven Back Metal Counter Height Barstool from Room Essentials™. Built on a metal frame, this black counter-height barstool set strikes a clean-lined silhouette with a slatted woven back to offer a comfortable sitting spot. Whether enjoying a nightcap or hosting a casual get-together, these counter-height barstools are designed to complement any occasion with modern appeal.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Overall Width: 17.9 inches
Overall Height: 36 inches
Overall Depth: 19.29 inches
Height from floor to seat: 24.2 inches
Back panel width: 16.5 inches
Back panel height: 9.65 inches
Seat panel front width: 15.55 inches
Seat panel back width: 14.17 inches
Seat panel depth: 13.38 inches
